values.value: ESA Section 7 consultation is required when a federal action may affect a listed species or critical habitat. Inadequate consultation, incomplete biological opinion, or failure to reinitiate consultation when new information emerges are frequent grounds for ESA-based NEPA challenges. Verify that formal Section 7 consultation is complete and the BiOp is current before closing the record. NOTE: ESA multiplier is 1.48x flat — USFWS ECOS API unavailable; multiplier cannot be decomposed into consultation-duration vs. jeopardy-finding sub-components. Treat as low-confidence until TAILS/PCTS data-sharing linkage is established.
